name: epydios-agentops-vscode
description: VS Code thread review client for the native M16/M18 AgentOps session contract.

commands.title: AgentOps: Open Thread By Task ID

agentops.runtimeApiBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the AgentOps runtime API.

agentops.tenantId.description: Optional tenant filter for native AgentOps thread listing.

agentops.projectId.description: Optional project filter for native AgentOps thread listing.

agentops.authToken.markdownDescription: Optional bearer token for runtime API requests. Leave blank for local unauthenticated development.

agentops.liveFollowWaitSeconds.description: Long-poll wait time for native session event follow in seconds.

agentops.includeLegacySessions.description: Include legacy projected sessions when loading thread review.

scripts.check: node --check extension.js && node --check lib/runtimeClient.js && node --check lib/sessionReview.js && node --check lib/threadContext.js && node --check lib/updateEnvelope.js && node --check lib/reportEnvelope.js
